learnings.pattern: CRITICAL: For CLASSIFICATION tasks (sentiment, NLI, topic), MUST use AutoModelForSequenceClassification, NOT AutoModelForCausalLM. Causal LM produces 0.0% accuracy on classification. With PEFT/LoRA, set task_type=TaskType.SEQ_CLS.
learnings.context: Any classification task with decoder-only models (GPT-2, DistilGPT-2)

learnings.pattern: PEFT/LoRA + HuggingFace Trainer ALWAYS fails on Apple MPS. Must force CPU via os.environ['CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES']='' at top of script, BEFORE any torch imports.
learnings.context: All PEFT/LoRA training on Apple Silicon

learnings.pattern: SST-2 column name mismatch: HuggingFace uses 'sentence', local JSON may use 'text'. Always check actual column names before processing. Also: test set has no labels (all zeros) — use validation set.
learnings.context: When loading SST-2 from different sources

learnings.pattern: HuggingFace PEFT library is the standard for LoRA. Use AutoTokenizer (not DistilGPT2Tokenizer). For DistilGPT-2: target_modules=['c_attn','c_proj'], rank 4-16, alpha=32, dropout=0.1.
Minimum 2000 training samples for meaningful fine-tuning. 500 samples → high variance, 20 samples → 62% accuracy. Use 2000+ for valid comparisons across configurations.
learnings.context: Dataset sizing for classification fine-tuning experiments

learnings.pattern: CPU training on 2000 samples, 2 epochs, batch_size=8 ≈ 200-400s. Never combine multiple seeds or configs in one execution (600s timeout). Use batch_size 8-16, eval_steps 500+. Use eval_strategy not evaluation_strategy.

Write metrics to JSON files IMMEDIATELY after each training run (not at script end). Separate training from evaluation — one task trains and saves, another loads results and computes statistics. Verify evaluation data exists before starting.
Fair comparisons require identical dataset sizes, identical preprocessing, and multiple seeds (3+). Never compare rank-4 on 1600 samples vs rank-16 on 500 samples.
learnings.context: When running ablation studies or configuration comparisons

learnings.pattern: GPT-2 models need explicit pad_token_id. Set tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token and model.config.pad_token_id = tokenizer.pad_token_id.
learnings.context: When using GPT-2 family models for classification with batched inference

learnings.pattern: Rewriting entire files to fix small bugs introduces new errors. Use edit_function for surgical fixes. Multiple failed rewrites indicate the approach is wrong — try a different strategy instead of a third rewrite.
learnings.context: When fixing bugs in existing code files
